mapper.insert: insert into notification_tbl ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, target_type, target_id, title, content, is_read, created_at ) values ( #{recipientMemberId}, #{senderMemberId}, #{notificationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{title}, #{content}, coalesce(#{isRead}, 'N'), CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') )
